channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Bombay High Court Stays Bail for Shiv Sena Corporator in Dombivli Doctors' Assault Case
item.description: The Bombay High Court on Saturday stayed the bail granted to Shiv Sena corporator Ramesh Mhatre, who was arrested for allegedly assaulting doctors and hospital staff at Shastri Nagar Hospital in Dombi...

item.title: CMA Calls for Protection of Workers' Rights in Tanzania
item.description: The Confederation of Tanzanian Trade Unions (CMA) has issued a strong call for domestic workers to actively defend their labor rights, emphasizing the importance of fair treatment and workplace protec...

item.title: Springboks Seek Clean Sweep in Nations Championship Clash Against Wales
item.description: The South African national rugby team, the Springboks, are set to face Wales in Durban as they aim to complete a perfect run in the first phase of the Nations Championship. The world champions have al...

item.title: Uganda's Veteran Statesman General Moses Ali Dies at 87, Leaves Lasting Legacy
item.description: General Moses Ali, a veteran Ugandan politician and military leader, has passed away at 87 while receiving treatment at Nakasero Hospital in Kampala. The Adjumani West MP, who was reelected earlier th...

item.title: Tanzania Enhances Strategies to Combat Human Trafficking
item.description: Tanzania has launched new initiatives to strengthen its efforts against human trafficking, a critical issue affecting the country's security and social fabric. The government has announced a multi-fac...

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 half-time show faces criticism over extended break
item.description: FIFA's decision to host a Super Bowl-style half-time show during the 2026 World Cup final has sparked significant criticism from players, pundits, and fans. The event, featuring performances by Justin...

item.title: Sandile Zungu Launches Safa Presidential Campaign to Revive South African Football
item.description: Sandile Zungu, owner of AmaZulu FC, has officially launched his campaign to become the next president of the South African Football Association (Safa), vowing to restore ambition, improve governance, ...

item.title: Senator Lacson disputes Cayetano's claims on net worth and accuses him of budget insertions
item.description: Senator Panfilo Lacson denied Senator Alan Peter Cayetano's allegation that his net worth had doubled, countering by accusing Cayetano of securing P6.79 billion in budget insertions under the 2025 Gen...

item.title: Restrictions on Telemedicine Access Highlight Patient Struggles
item.description: This article details the ongoing struggle of patient Robin Clough and her husband Dr. Gene Dorio to access medical care through telemedicine due to restrictive laws in California. After undergoing lif...

item.title: First Nation community devastated by rapid wildfire, residents evacuate on small boats
item.description: A remote First Nation community was completely destroyed by a wildfire that spread rapidly, forcing residents to evacuate themselves using outdated 12- to 14-foot boats with motors over 80 years old. ...

item.title: Petroleum Minister Announces Daily Fuel Price Adjustments to Promote Transparency and Fair Pricing
item.description: The Petroleum Minister, Ali Pervaiz Malik, announced daily fuel price adjustments to curb market abuse, eliminate windfall gains, and ensure fair pricing for consumers. This reform, introduced followi...

item.title: Top 12 Evening Gowns for Binibining Pilipinas 2026 Contestants
item.description: The article highlights the evening gowns worn by the Top 12 finalists of the Binibining Pilipinas 2026 pageant, designed by Filipino fashion creators. It showcases the blend of traditional Filipino cr...

item.title: Bayelsa Police Arrest Three Ministry Staff Over N500m Equipment Theft
item.description: Three staff members from the Bayelsa State Ministry of Labour, Empowerment and Productivity have been arrested for allegedly stealing government equipment worth over N500 million. The suspects, identi...

item.title: Ukraine's military chief faces backlash after controversial reshuffle sparks nationwide protests
item.description: Mykhailo Fedorov, Ukraine's former defence minister and tech innovator, was abruptly removed from his post amid a government reshuffle, sparking widespread protests across the country. Fedorov, known ...

item.title: Tuchel Defends Tactics Amid England-France Bronze Final Speculation
item.description: England are set to face France in Miami for the 2026 World Cup bronze final following their semi-final defeat to Argentina. Manager Thomas Tuchel has faced intense scrutiny over his tactical decisions...

item.title: US-Iran Tensions Escalate as Agreement Collapses and Conflict Resurfaces
item.description: The US and Iran's fragile ceasefire has collapsed after a series of escalating attacks and counterattacks. The conflict began with an Iranian drone strike on a cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz, a cr...

item.title: Irish Actress Brenda Fricker, Oscar-Winning Star of 'My Left Foot,' Dies at 81
item.description: Brenda Fricker, the Irish actress who won an Oscar for her role in 'My Left Foot,' has died at the age of 81. Known for her iconic performances in films like 'Home Alone 2' and the TV series 'Casualty...

item.title: NYC mayor considers legal options to arrest Netanyahu over ICC charges
item.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani is evaluating the legal authority to arrest Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu if he visits the city, citing ICC charges against him for alleged crimes agains...

item.title: Long-Dormant Alien Terrorist Removal Court Receives Its First Case Since Its Creation
item.description: The Trump administration has activated the Alien Terrorist Removal Court, a little-used federal court established by Congress approximately 30 years ago to handle cases involving the removal of noncit...

item.title: Mama Jimmy Reflects on Long-Distance Love and Music's Role in Keeping Her Married to Baba Jimmy
item.description: Mama Jimmy shared a nostalgic TikTok post recalling her long-distance relationship with her mzungu husband, Baba Jimmy, before they married and settled in the US. She revealed how listening to a speci...
